name: David French

contactInfo.office: 107 N. Bois D'Arc St., Troup, TX 75789

bio: David French serves as the Mayor of Troup, a small city in southeastern Smith County. Troup is a close-knit community with a proud heritage. The mayor presides over council meetings and advocates for city improvements and services for residents.
campaignPromises: Support local businesses and economic development
Maintain city services within a responsible budget
Ensure reliable water and utility services
